title: Mildly Browned Mediterranean Feta Pasta
description: A lacto-vegetarian friendly weeknight Mediterranean dish featuring whole milk and feta cheese, cooked to a perfect mildly browned finish in a kazan cauldron.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a kazan cauldron over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to brown.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the pasta to the kazan cauldron, stirring to combine with the onion and garlic mixture.
Pour in the whole milk, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook, stirring occasionally, until the pasta is al dente and the milk has started to brown and thicken.
Stir in the crumbly feta cheese until it is fully incorporated and the sauce is smooth.
Add the dried oregano, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Serve the Mildly Browned Mediterranean Feta Pasta hot, garnished with additional feta cheese if desired.
